title: Bridge Essay: Classic psychedelic use and current meditation practice.
concept: Psychedelic decoupling — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states of consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.
**Phase context:** Psychedelic decoupling — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states of consciousness.

**Classic psychedelic use and current meditation practice.** — Mindfulness (N Y) (2023). DOI: 10.1007/s12671-023-02103-w. PMID: 37693239. OBJECTIVES: Previous research has investigated potential synergies between classic psychedelics and meditation practice, but relatively little remains known about the relationship between classic psychedelic experiences and engagement with meditation practice.The purpose of this study was to investigate associations between classic psychedelic experiences and engagement with two popular types of meditation: mindfulness meditation and loving-kindness or compassion meditation.
